message:
bench: add search and label-intel benchmark groups

Add missing benchmark coverage for:
- search: text and hybrid modes at 100/500/1000 issue scales
- label_intel: label health and cross-label flow at 100/500 scales

Benchmark suite now covers 14 groups (was 12): analyzer, triage,
insights, plan, diff, forecast, suggest, alerts, history, cycles,
search, label_intel, real_fixture, stress_fixture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
